references.title: C++23 Standard Draft
references.description: The latest ISO C++23 Working Draft on GitHub — always up to date with approved changes.

references.title: C++20 Official Standard (ISO)
references.description: The official ISO C++20 Standard document (paid). The definitive specification of the language.

references.title: C++ Core Guidelines
references.description: Collaborative guidelines led by Bjarne Stroustrup and Herb Sutter for writing safe, modern C++.

references.title: cppreference.com
references.description: The de-facto community reference for C++ — standard library API, language features, and examples.

references.title: isocpp.org — Standard C++ Foundation
references.description: The official hub for C++ news, FAQ, and the ISO C++ committee — superb beginner and expert resources.

references.title: C++ Compiler Support Table
references.description: Cross-compiler C++ feature support matrix — quickly check which features are available in GCC, Clang, MSVC.

references.title: GCC C++ Support Status
references.description: Official GCC project page tracking C++ standard implementation status for every GCC release.

references.title: Clang C++ Support Status
references.description: Official Clang project tracking C++ standard implementation — including C++17, 20, and 23 features.

references.title: Compiler Explorer (Godbolt)
references.description: Interactive tool to explore compiler assembly output for any C++ snippet across multiple compilers and flags.

references.title: Quick-Bench
references.description: Quick online C++ micro-benchmarking tool powered by Google Benchmark — compare snippets instantly.

articles.title: 2022 Annual C++ Developer Survey Results
articles.description: Annual developer survey from isocpp.org — insights on compiler usage, libraries, language features, and community priorities.

articles.title: C++ Weekly (Jason Turner)
articles.description: A long-running YouTube series with short weekly videos on C++ features, tools, best practices, and gotchas.

articles.title: Modernes C++ (Rainer Grimm)
articles.description: Deep-dive articles on modern C++ features — concurrency, templates, ranges, coroutines — by Rainer Grimm.

articles.title: CppCon — YouTube Channel
articles.description: Full talk recordings from CppCon — the world's largest annual C++ conference — going back to 2014.

articles.title: Ankur Satle's Blog
articles.description: Practical C++ articles from CppIndia co-founder Ankur Satle — covering design patterns, value semantics, and modern C++.

articles.title: Abseil C++ Tips of the Week
articles.description: Bite-sized, practical C++ tips from Google engineers — covering style, performance, and correctness.
